name: Chicken Scalopine
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a large non-stick frying pan.
2. Saute the mushrooms until tender and any liquid has evaporated; remove from the pan and set aside.
3. Melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter in the same pan.
4. Saute the chicken breasts on both sides until golden brown and cooked through; remove from the pan and set aside.
5. Add the onions to the pan and saute until tender.
6. Add water, wine, and bouillon mix to the pan. Bring to a boil.
7. Cook and stir until the mixture is reduced by half.
8. Add the whipping cream to the pan. Cook and stir until slightly thickened.
9. Add salt and pepper to taste.
10. Return the mushrooms and chicken to the sauce in the pan.
11. Reheat to serving temperature.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
